no: BG1 quest mod featuring a Lathanderite cleric questline with 14 quests and a new cleric/thief of Lathander companion. Spiritual successor to Errant Justice (which the author has deprecated). EET-native.
sum: BG1 quest mod featuring 14 quests centered on a Lathanderite cleric seeking justice, with emphasis on roleplay and alignment-shifting outcomes based on player choices.
